'ω' )و ","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N70rZxpXpAhwUlAeElh1tFI5LDR3xwlvHwx0lJ/OBC1I","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/60218535038a4301aba55b768349a068~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789093&x-signature=Q%2FGrTJQpRM57KlRcsVp84NXToeM%3D","user_id":"3883071843336328","user_name":"风&⑦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3883071843336328","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1756029745,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7129381055034821664","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流+主脑洞微恐+有CP+群像】
陆虞是一名入圈三年的十八线小透明艺人。
电视导演：什么垃圾演技？滚出我的剧组。
综艺导演：一点综艺感也没有，你这样平庸的人，也想混娱乐圈？
经纪人：你除了一张脸，一无是处。
然而，当陆虞成为游戏馆馆主，进入逃生游戏之后——
“想活吗？想活就配合我。”
“听我的话，是你们现在唯一能做的选择。”
死亡？
不，除了她自己，没有人有权利对她的生命做主！

d":"7180709197909132067","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本我是真的爱，真的可以冲，真的很好看，感情线其实除了观众磕CP氛围重，其他时候都高能在线，超帅的好叭，男女主这感情也是循序渐进的，真的在一起会很有成就感的！（自己一步步康着在一起的哎！）副本真的很动脑筋（我智商布星，所以真的崇拜男女主）每一个副本都质量在线，总体走的还是烧脑破副本的线，逻辑也在，剧情是真的满足，很细节！真的很喜欢，所以快更新[哭]不够看啊[舔屏][舔屏]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1671889207,"group_id":"7129381055034821664","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"11","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/okbQbTIlifM20Hyo8btjY3UWEgPpIKKFit5wCkmNPl","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e2cd9c583ddb422f9a5bc8cc203da2ae~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790919&x-signature=5sakKJjscNBGWPIO24yAJ50i1k4%3D","user_id":"1736837180174616","user_name":"淮风不是风"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1736837180174616","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7129381055034821664","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流+主脑洞微恐+有CP+群像】
